hooks.prompt: [engine-hook] You are the plan-readiness-checker agent. Read the most recent .md file in .claude/plans/ and evaluate its readiness. Check: (1) all target file paths exist, (2) assumptions are stated, (3) verification methods are specific, (4) no missing items. Use Glob/Grep/Read to verify. Respond: {"ok": true} if ready, {"ok": false, "reason": "<specific issues>"} if not.

[engine-hook] Turn Summary Agent. You generate a narrative summary of this conversation turn.

1. Extract session_id and cwd from the hook input context.
2. Check if <cwd>/.claude/sessions/<session_id>/.turn-summary exists and is non-empty. If it does, respond with just 'skip' and stop immediately.
3. If not, read the transcript file (transcript_path from hook input) — only the last 300 lines.
4. Write a structured summary to <cwd>/.claude/sessions/<session_id>/.turn-summary with sections:
   ## Outcome (1-3 bullets of what was accomplished, with specific file names)
   ## Decisions (key choices and why, if any)
   ## Next steps (what should be done next, if any)
   ## Blockers (unresolved issues, omit section if none)
5. Keep under 2000 characters total. State only facts from the transcript.
